imageDescription: Woman in white wrap crossing both forearms/wrists in front of her body, a common greeting handshape.
notes: Type A gesture, label accurate; kept approved.

imageDescription: Woman raising one open hand near her shoulder while the other hand is held flat below, with arrows showing the motion arc.
notes: Matches existing glossary term 'odikinin' = morning.

imageDescription: Woman with both hands in claw/fist shapes near her throat/chin.
notes: Original acholiLabel 'ber' only means 'good', missing the time-of-day word; replaced with fuller phrase.

imageDescription: Woman with both hands in fists, forearms crossed at chest, arrows pointing outward to each side.
notes: Original acholiLabel 'odiko' actually means 'morning' (conflicts with greetings_16_88's correct use of 'odikinin'/morning) - corrected to an evening phrase using 'otyeno' (afternoon/evening, added as new term on previous entry).

imageDescription: Woman with both hands pressed together near her mouth/chin, eyes lowered, prayer-like pose.
notes: Builds on existing glossary term 'dyewor' = night.

imageDescription: Woman with fingers of both hands interlaced/clasped together at chest height, arrow pointing upward.
notes: Matches existing UI translation for 'welcome' in acholi-glossary.json ui section.

imageDescription: Woman with one hand held in front of body, palm/fingers gesture, arrow showing downward-left motion.
notes: Clear Type A gesture; promoted hold to approved. Matches existing glossary term 'iyie nining'/'itye nining' = how are you.

imageDescription: Woman with one hand held in front of body, similar pose to the 'How are you?' image, fingers gesture toward the other hand.
notes: Matches existing glossary term 'atye maber' = i am fine.

imageDescription: Person making a hand gesture with one hand open below and the other hand near a small squiggle shape; the caption printed in the image reads 'Quran'.
notes: Image is captioned 'Quran' (a religious reference sign), completely unrelated to 'Nice to meet you'. No existing category (alphabet/numbers/greetings/family/emotions/school/food/colors/animals/places/actions/time/money/math/quantities) fits a religious-text concept, so rejected.

imageDescription: Man with one hand raised showing an open palm (waving), other arm extended horizontally.
notes: Original acholiLabel 'ber' just means 'good'; replaced with an actual farewell phrase.

imageDescription: Small line drawing of two overlapping rounded hand/fist shapes (cropped, low detail).
notes: Cropped but plausibly a hand/fist shape consistent with a 'thank you' gesture; kept approved per existing reviewNotes and matches glossary 'apwoyo'.

imageDescription: Line drawing of two hands, one finger pointed and the other hand with an arrow showing outward motion.
notes: Matches existing glossary term 'tika' = please.

imageDescription: Line drawing of one hand with a finger sliding upward along the palm/wrist of the other hand, arrow showing direction.
notes: Type A gesture, label accurate; kept approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a single buckled shoe.
notes: Image is clearly a shoe, completely unrelated to 'Excuse me'. No existing category (clothing isn't in the valid list) fits 'Shoe', so rejected.

imageDescription: Line drawing of two hands coming together/touching, with an arrow showing motion.
notes: Type A gesture, label accurate; kept approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of two hands meeting in a high-five/clap style gesture.
notes: Matches existing glossary term 'pe' = no, used idiomatically for 'no problem'.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a round basin/bowl.
notes: Image is a basin/bowl, unrelated to 'Congratulations'. No existing category fits a household-item 'Basin', so rejected.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a person with one hand/arm raised near the head, arrow showing upward movement.
notes: Clear Type A gesture; promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of an arm/hand with arrows showing a patting/rubbing motion at the torso.
notes: Builds on existing glossary term 'cwinya ameda' = happy, expanded into the full phrase 'happy new year'.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a rolled-up mat or sheet of paper/cloth.
notes: Image is a rolled mat/paper, unrelated to 'Good Luck'. No existing category fits 'Mat', so rejected.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a chair.
notes: Image is a chair, unrelated to 'Well done'. No existing category fits furniture items like 'Chair', so rejected.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a hand with one finger pointing downward with an arrow, the other hand held flat below.
notes: Type A gesture, label accurate; kept approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a table with four legs.
notes: Image is a table, unrelated to 'Safe journey'. No existing category fits furniture items like 'Table', so rejected.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a person with both hands extended forward/downward, arrows showing motion.
notes: Type A gesture, label accurate; kept approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a person with both hands together near the torso, similar prayer-like pose.
acholiLabel: Nino me Yweyo me Yom Cwiny
notes: Type A gesture, label accurate; kept approved. Builds on existing glossary 'cwinya ameda' = happy.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a pocket calculator with a numeric keypad.
notes: RECATEGORIZED: image is clearly a calculator, unrelated to 'See you later'; relabeled 'Calculator' and moved from greetings to math.

imageDescription: Woman in formal dress with eyes closed, both hands clasped together near her chest in a respectful greeting pose.
notes: Distinct formal-greeting handshape (different from the informal version); kept the (Formal) qualifier since it denotes a genuinely different sign, not section meta-text.

imageDescription: Man making a two-handed gesture near chest/chin level, casual posture.
notes: Distinct informal-greeting handshape; kept the (Informal) qualifier as a genuinely different sign.

imageDescription: Woman with both hands cupped/clasped together in front of her body.

newGlossaryTerm.english: long time / it's been a while

notes: Original acholiLabel 'pe' (=no) doesn't convey 'long time'; replaced with 'kare malac' (long time).

imageDescription: Line drawing of a fist/arm with shirt sleeve, arrow pointing up and to the left.
notes: Clear Type A gesture; promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Man with one hand pointing with an arrow, the other hand below.
notes: Clear Type A gesture; promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Man with one hand cupped/open near torso, arrow showing downward motion to the other hand.
notes: Clear Type A gesture; promoted hold to approved. Builds on existing glossary term 'cuk' = school.

imageDescription: Man with both arms extended forward in fists, arrows showing motion.
notes: Clear Type A gesture; promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Man with both fists crossed/touching in front of his chest.
notes: Builds on existing glossary term 'gang' = home.

imageDescription: Line drawing of two hands with fingers spread, a small 'n' letter shape visible nearby.
notes: Clear Type A gesture; promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of two hands in a slightly different finger configuration than the 'What is your name?' image.
notes: Promoted hold to approved; stripped trailing '...' as meta-style ellipsis, keeping the concrete phrase 'My name is'.

imageDescription: Person with crossed arms, one hand in a fist gesture.
notes: Type A gesture, label accurate; kept approved.

imageDescription: Person with arm extended, hand gesture, arrow showing upward-left motion.
notes: Type A gesture, label accurate; kept approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of two fists/arms side by side, arrow pointing upward.
notes: Type A gesture, label accurate; kept approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of two fists/arms side by side, arrow pointing upward (similar to Neighbor but slightly different configuration).
notes: Type A gesture, label accurate; kept approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of both arms raised with fists near shoulder/neck level, arrows pointing upward.
notes: Type A gesture, label accurate; kept approved.

imageDescription: Cropped fragment showing a zigzag arrow line with two tiny fist-like shapes at the corners; very low detail, no visible body/arm.
notes: Image fragment is too illegible to confidently confirm what gesture it depicts; kept on hold.

imageDescription: Cropped fragment showing a zigzag arrow line with a small fist shape at one end; very low detail, no visible body/arm.
notes: Image fragment is too illegible to confidently confirm what gesture it depicts; kept on hold.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a hand with fingers pinched together near the top, arm extending downward with a vertical reference line.
notes: Clear Type A gesture; promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of two hands meeting/touching near the chin/face area.
notes: Clear Type A meeting/introduction gesture; promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a fist with forearm extended, pointing toward a zigzag/arrow shape.
notes: Legible Type A fist+forearm gesture; promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of an arm with an open hand, large circular/oval arrow showing an encompassing motion.
notes: Clear Type A circular/encompassing gesture; promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of two arms/hands moving toward each other, arrows pointing inward.
notes: Clear Type A gesture of two hands coming together, matches 'Together' well; promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of an arm with an open hand, circular arrow motion (mirror image of the 'Group' gesture).
notes: Original acholiLabel 'acel' (=one) was close but 'kenken' (alone) is more precise; promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of an arm with hand extended forward, circular arrow motion below the hand, small '1' marker.
notes: Clear, legible Type A gesture; promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of an arm/hand with a curved arrow forming a loop near the hand.
notes: Clear, legible Type A gesture; promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of two hands, one with fingers spread vertically and the other with fingers together horizontally, arrow pointing between them.
notes: Matches existing UI translation for 'language' = 'Leb'; clear two-hand gesture, promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of two hands with fingers spread, positioned side by side.
notes: Clear two-hand Type A gesture; promoted hold to approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a hand with spread fingers, downward arrow pointing onto it.
notes: Matches the 'kony' root already used in UI badge text ('Lakony Dano').

imageDescription: Line drawing of one hand resting on/touching the other forearm.
notes: Type A gesture, label accurate; kept approved.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a mosquito with wings, legs, and proboscis visible.
notes: RECATEGORIZED: image is clearly a mosquito, completely unrelated to 'Cooperation'; relabeled 'Mosquito' and moved from greetings to animals.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a face with both hands near the mouth, fingers curled, arrows pointing outward to both sides.
notes: Gesture is legible but 'Community' is highly abstract and not confidently matched to this specific mouth/hand gesture; kept on hold.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a cat with a curled tail.
notes: RECATEGORIZED: image is clearly a cat, unrelated to 'Society'; relabeled 'Cat' and moved from greetings to animals. Matches existing glossary term 'paka' = cat.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a face with a hand, fingers pinched together, touching near the lips.
notes: Gesture is legible but 'Culture' is highly abstract/academic and not confidently matched to this specific mouth gesture; kept on hold.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a face with one finger pointing upward near the mouth/chin, vertical reference line.
notes: Gesture is legible but 'Tradition' is highly abstract/academic and not confidently matched to this specific gesture; kept on hold.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a face with one finger touching the teeth/mouth.
notes: Gesture (finger touching teeth) appears nearly identical to greetings_19_374 ('Duty'), suggesting the labels for this group of abstract terms are unreliable; kept on hold.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a dog's head and curled tail.
notes: RECATEGORIZED: image is clearly a dog, unrelated to 'Rights'; relabeled 'Dog' and moved from greetings to animals. Matches existing glossary term 'gwok' = dog.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a face with one finger touching the teeth/mouth (nearly identical to greetings_19_372 'History').
notes: Gesture appears nearly identical to greetings_19_372 ('History'), suggesting the labels for this group of abstract terms are unreliable; kept on hold.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a snake, coiled with head raised.
notes: RECATEGORIZED: image is clearly a snake, unrelated to 'Freedom'; relabeled 'Snake' and moved from greetings to animals.

imageDescription: Line drawing of a face with both hands near the mouth in fist shapes, curved arrow showing a rotating motion.
notes: Gesture is legible but 'Justice' is highly abstract/academic and not confidently matched to this specific gesture; kept on hold.
